_comment_R84: Backtest-only overrides for SUPERTREND validation. Layered AFTER config_dry.json via `freqtrade backtesting -c config_dry.json -c config_backtest.json`. Replaces the dynamic VolumePairList (R63 — works in trade mode but unsupported in backtest) with a frozen StaticPairList of 5 majors. Use this only for backtesting; live trading reads config_dry.json's dynamic pairlist for fresh top-30 selection.
